name: environmental_licensing_backlog_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Environmental Policy, the situation tagged internally around environmental licensing backlog stonehaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both truth and loyalty; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Mei Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Mei Ishikawa, the accountable executive on this bridge in Environmental Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Leila Santos
agents.identity: I am Leila Santos, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Environmental Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Mei Ishikawa must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Mei Ishikawa do?
